Excellent. Moving on to the next step. Always a little bit of synopsis because repetition is a mother of learning. So we started the started the client out on a food list. Okay put themselves into deficit by eating healthier and by weighing themselves every day. We took that and we transitioned to okay now we're gonna say eat this many meals to get some meal patterning down and also start eyeballing your portions to a caloric load that we eventually want you to get to it very accurate way. So we know this isn't going to be super accurate but it is better than nothing. Okay then we moved from the hand method the hand method to now moving to food mass. Okay grams ounces things like that and then taking that and logging it into my fitness panel. Bear in mind the caloric value of the template is never going to change at least at this point it is only the way that the person measures that is introducing a greater deficit because the more accurate a person is the more of a deficit they put themselves into. Okay so now that they're getting used to tracking food in my fitness pal off of a template okay they have an idea of how many calories that they're consuming and the distribution of protein carbohydrate and fat all very well and good. The next step to this phase is now you're actually going to be grass back to the food list okay and you're gonna nix the template if you would like okay go back to the food list and say okay just eat this many calories and that caloric load is going to be the same caloric load of what was originally on the template so if they're on a 1500 calorie template then just be like alright here's the food list get to 1500 calories however you like and obviously lean towards the food list but also if they want to if now they have a little bit more freedom of like if they're at a place that doesn't have a food on the food list or they need to go out or whatever the case may be now they have a way more freedom to incorporate things off the list if they need to but still stay within the caloric load to meet their goals okay so to reiterate we're actually regressing going back from the template okay now going back to the food list but we're bringing back a specific amount of calories that they need to consume okay preferably from the food list but if they need to go off of it because of life that's okay too they have the experience and practice tracking on my fitness pal by tracking what they consumed off of the meal plan and so now they're increasing their accuracy a little more by virtue of getting more practice in but they're also earning a little bit of freedom in terms of their food choices so this is how we incorporate more freedom so people can still enjoy their lives day-to-day and continue to make progress now the next step gives the ultimate amount of freedom so I'm excited to talk about that soon
